prompt: Run a security check on our Docker setup. I want to know if our containers have known vulnerabilities (CVEs), if the Dockerfile is following best practices, and if our docker-compose.yml is hardened properly — especially around port exposure and credential handling.

assertions.description: A security-report.md file is written to outputs/
Dockerfile is read and audited (non-root user, base image, COPY vs ADD)
docker-compose.yml port binding is checked (127.0.0.1 vs 0.0.0.0)
Checks whether postgres and redis ports are exposed externally
Trivy is either run or documented as missing with install instructions
Checks how credentials are handled in docker-compose.yml (env vars vs hardcoded)
